risk_title: State-Owned Enterprise Anti-Competitive Behavior Blocking Private Sector Participation
risk_summary: The state-owned enterprise (ESL) operating the Modjo Dry Port is engaging in uncompetitive behavior that is preventing private sector operators from entering the market, directly undermining a core project objective and creating governance tensions between the project and the dominant state actor.
evidence_quote: Indicator is doubtful to be achieved within the project period due to uncompetitive behavior of the state owned enterprise (ESL's) that owns the dry port

risk_summary: The Political and Governance risk rating has been elevated from Moderate (at approval in 2017) to Substantial (current), indicating worsening governance fragility or political instability affecting project implementation environment.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance: Rating at Approval 31 Mar 2017 - Moderate; Last Approved Rating ISR Seq. 016 - 20 Mar 2025 - Substantial; Proposed Rating - Substantial
